title: Nutty Dumpling Snack
description: A sweet and crumbly snack made with nutty dumplings and a hint of monsoon spice.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Place the nutty dumplings on the baking sheet, leaving space between each dumpling.
Mix the monsoon spice blend with a pinch of salt and sprinkle evenly over the dumplings.
Bake for 10-12 minutes or until the dumplings are lightly browned.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 2 minutes.
Dust the dumplings with cocoa powder and drizzle with maple syrup.
